title: Draper Garden Hand Fork | Heavy Duty Carbon Steel Weeding Tool | Soft Grip Plastic Handle | 88807
features: Easy Use - Leather hang strap that can be used for easy storage or as a wrist strap for secure usage
High Performance Blade - Fully hardened and tempered carbon steel blade to ensure maximum performance
Draper Quality - Reliable Draper Tools quality guaranteed
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper 88807 Tools Carbon Steel Heavy Duty Hand Fork Manufactured from epoxy coated carbon steel which is hardened and tempered with plated ferrule. Includes lacquered ash handle and wrist strap. Draper tools are manufactured to good quality that are controlled by Draper's quality control engineers. Each product are packed with useful features to improve its performance. Ease of use and ergonomic design are key features in all Draper tools making them suitable for anybody who requires a quality tool.
